zh.lifeSummary: 當William Alger於1400年出生在英國艾可林瑟爾時，他的父親John Alger21歲，母親Maria of Lindsell20歲。他於1420年與Annabella Day在英國英格蘭艾可林瑟爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1468年3月3日在英國英格蘭艾可林瑟爾享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Alger于1400年出生在英国艾可林瑟爾时，他的父亲John Alger21岁，母亲Maria of Lindsell20岁。他于1420年与Annabella Day在英国英格兰艾可林瑟爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1468年3月3日在英国英格兰艾可林瑟爾享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Alger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Alger. Pronounced with a soft g it is from Old French Alg(i)er, Aug(i)er (ancient Germanic Adalgari, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + gāri ‘spear’); see Auger . Pronounced with a hard g, it is a variant of Algar .
Scottish and English: in Scotland, Alger may be a variant of Algeo .
German: from a shortened form of the ancient Germanic personal name Adalgar (see 1 above).

variants.name: Auger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Gaston, Lucien, Marcel, Mederic, Normand, Raoul, Cecile, Emile, Fernand, Gaetan.

French: from the Old French personal name Auger, which can be from ancient Germanic Adalgari, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + gaira- ‘lance, spear’, or Albgari, with the first element alb ‘elf’. Compare Auge , Oge , Ogea , and Osier .

variants.name: Algar
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Algar, representing the falling together of two Old English names, Ælfgār and Æthelgār, composed of the elements respectively ælf ‘elf’ or æthel ‘noble’ + gār ‘spear’. It could also be from the much rarer Old English personal name Ealdgār, composed of elements meaning ‘old’ + ‘spear’. In East Anglia, it is more probably a variant of Alger (Old Norse Álfgeirr). See also Agar , Elgar .

variants.name: Alker
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Frieda, Gerhart.
English: habitational name from Altcar, Lancashire. This name means ‘marshland by the River Alt’, from Old Norse kjarr ‘marsh’ and the river name Alt.

variants.name: Ager
meanings: English (mainly Essex, Suffolk, and Northamptonshire): variant of   Alger   or possibly of   Edgar  .
Danish: habitational name from any of several places called Ager, meaning ‘plowed land’ (from a cognate of the English word acre).
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Adgari, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + gari (from garwa) ‘ready, eager’ or gari ‘spear’. This surname is very rare in France.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Alger was born in 1400, in Lindsell, Essex, England, his father, John Alger, was 21 and his mother, Maria of Lindsell, was 20. He married Annabella Day in 1420, in Lindsell, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 3 March 1468, in Lindsell, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Alger est né en 1400, à Lindsell, Essex, Angleterre, son père, John Alger, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Maria of Lindsell, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Annabella Day en 1420, à Lindsell, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 3 mars 1468, à Lindsell, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Alger 1400 in Lindsell, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Alger 21 und seine Mutter Maria of Lindsell 20. Er hat 1420 in Lindsell, Essex, England, United Kingdom Annabella Day geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 3. März 1468 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Lindsell, Essex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Alger è nato il nel 1400 nel Lindsell, Essex, England, il suo padre, John Alger, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Maria of Lindsell, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Annabella Day nel 1420, nel Lindsell, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 3 marzo 1468, nel Lindsell, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Algerが1400年にイギリスエセックスリンドセルで生まれた時，父John Algerは21歳，母Maria of Lindsellは20歳であった。1420年にイギリスイギリスエセックスリンドセルでAnnabella Dayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1468年3月3日にイギリスイギリスエセックスリンドセルで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Alger(이)가 1400년 영국 에세스 린드셀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Alger(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria of Lindsell(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 린드셀에서 Annabella Day(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1468년 3월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 린드셀에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Alger nasceu em 1400, em Lindsell, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Alger, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Maria of Lindsell, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Annabella Day em 1420, em Lindsell, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 3 de março de 1468, em Lindsell, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Alger родился в 1400 г. в местности линдселл, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Alger было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Maria of Lindsell, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Annabella Day в 1420 г. в местности линдселл, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 3 марта 1468 г. в местности линдселл, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Alger nació en 1400, en Lindsell, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Alger, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Maria of Lindsell, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Annabella Day en 1420, en Lindsell, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 3 de marzo de 1468, en Lindsell, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
